name: conductor-vs-claude-template
description: Template for comparing equivalent Conductor/Codex and Claude Code Ultracode benchmark reports. Fill both report paths after running the same benchmark suite under equivalent budgets.
requirements: Reports must use the same suite name and task ids.
Reports must be produced on equivalent hardware and repository state.
Run manifests must record model, effort, tool permissions, agent caps, timeouts, cost budgets, scoring, and safety incidents.
Template manifests with live_run=false must be replaced by real manifests before making parity claims.
Do not interpret duration as meaningful unless hardware, model, and network conditions are comparable.
